prestazioni: Engine: CDNB 2.0L TFSI (EA888 Gen 3B) – Full hybrid turbo upgrade to Garrett GTX3076R Gen II with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate for 400+ HP on 98 RON fuel with Cobb Accessport Stage 2+ tune and custom ethanol flex-fuel mapping via APR’s TCU integration.

Suspension: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and preload), custom valving for the Q5 Sportback’s 5-link rear axle, and Audi-specific top mounts from 034 Motorsport to eliminate NVH while retaining OEM-level crash safety compliance.

Drivetrain: 034 Motorsport Stage 2 High Torque clutch kit with sintered metallic friction discs, reinforced pressure plate, and lightweight flywheel (12.5 lbs) paired with an Audi S4 (B9) 0B5 8-speed Tiptronic transmission remapped via Alientech KESS3 for faster shifts and torque limiter removal (up to 550 Nm).
estetica: Aero: Prior Design PD800RS widebody kit with carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser, designed specifically for the Q5 Sportback’s sloped roofline to reduce lift by 30% at 120 mph (verified in wind tunnel testing).

Wheels: Rotiform LAS-R 20x9.5 ET35 (front) and 20x10.5 ET40 (rear) in matte bronze, paired with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/40/20 front, 275/35/20 rear) for optimal load distribution and turn-in response.

Exterior: Full respray in Audi Nardo Grey (LZ7Z) with 3M Matte Black Satin vinyl wrap on the roof, mirrors, and lower cladding, plus custom laser-cut carbon fiber side blades from Vorsteiner with integrated LED turn signals and a rear spoiler delete for a stealth OEM+ look.
